name: Harpymon

signature_move.name: Wind Seeker
signature_move.description: Manipulates the wind, generating a vacuum blade.

description: An Armor-level Mythical Beast Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Light ". Possessing wing-arms and a female upper body, it is a thief Digimon that is called the " Snatcher " from how it steals valuable data (treasure) from databases (ruins). It shows up like a gale, seizing treasure and attacking with its large talons. Although its power is lacking, the continuous attacks unleashed using its speed are terrifying. Its Special Move is manipulating the wind, generating a vacuum blade ( Wind Seeker ). Harpymon was adopted from a winning Digimon entry in the " Digimon Web Dot-art Contest " which belonged to Ms. Sudou Chie from Saitama prefecture .
